text: I've been experiencing an issue where the two-factor authentication codes simply aren't coming through, and it's been nearly three days since I've been able to access my account. This situation is deeply concerning and frustrating.
I can't believe how high your subscription fees have become. This is really disappointing and feels unfair to loyal customers.

I appreciate your assistance. However, I previously ordered two items but only received one. Although I initially requested a reshipment, I am now seeking a refund for the missing item instead due to the unexpected delay.

Dear Support Team, I am experiencing an issue where the checkout button seems unresponsive, and I am unable to proceed with my purchase. This problem persists despite trying different browsers and clearing my cache. I would appreciate your assistance as I need this resolved urgently.
Hey, I'm having trouble accessing my account. I think I might need some help resetting my password, but I'm not sure what to do next.
Hello, could you please clarify if there are usage limits on the API for the search function? Thank you.

I'm having this weird issue where the app won't load any images at all. It's like everything's stuck on a loading screen for hours! Also, just to let you know, I was trying to use it while connected to my Wi-Fi and had my coffee. Is that a problem?

Hey, my app says it's connected to the internet but won't load anything! I don't understand why it's acting up since everything else works. It's weird because I just updated the app and it was fine before. Can you help?
I must express my dissatisfaction with the recent changes to your pricing structure. It seems unreasonable and I am curious about the rationale behind it.
I'm really disappointed with the recent price hikes. It seems unreasonable to expect loyal customers to absorb such increases without any notice.
I haven't received the two-factor authentication codes for my account. It's been two days, and I'm locked out now.
Dear Support Team, I would like to inquire if there are any specific limitations regarding the usage of the API's search endpoint, particularly in terms of rate limits. Thank you for your assistance.
Hi, so I was wondering if the API can handle multiple requests at once? Sometimes it seems like it doesn't work right? But other times it does, very confusing.
I can't believe I received only one item from my order when I was expecting two. This is really disappointing. I would like to request a refund for the missing item, not a replacement.

I recently placed an order for a unique handcrafted vase, but only the accompanying card arrived. I am incredibly disappointed and would like a full refund for the vase that never came. Please assist me with this matter.
I'm having issues, the app keeps crashing every time I try to log in. No error messages or anything, just a total freeze. It's been like this since the last update, really need help!
The new pricing structure feels unfair, but I guess some people might like it? It's just too much for what we get.
I can't believe your service has gotten so bad. The new pricing makes no sense and it's just outrageous.
I received my order, but one of the items is missing. Could you please issue a refund for the item I didn't get?

I've been waiting for a two-factor authentication code for over two days, and now I can’t log into my account! It’s really frustrating because I thought I received the codes but maybe I didn’t? Can someone help me get back in?
Hi there, I'm really hoping to get some clarity on whether or not your API has any rate limits for the search endpoint? I tried using it but I'm unsure if I'm hitting some unseen restrictions.
